## Summary

Explain the user-facing change and the motivation behind it.

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev` if production dependencies changed
- [ ] `./install.sh --mode config --domain example.com --gateway-port 18789 --install-dir /tmp/markos-ui --output-dir /tmp/markos-ui-config --non-interactive` if installer or deploy templates changed

## Release Notes

- [ ] README or docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Release checklist updated if the shipping workflow changed
- [ ] Labels added for release note categorization
